api_token.description: Pipedrive API token. Sent as the api_token query parameter on every request; never logged.

base_url.description: Pipedrive API base URL override for tests or proxies.

replication_start_date.description: RFC3339 or Pipedrive-accepted timestamp lower bound; passed as the stream's since parameter (since_timestamp for deals/persons/organizations, since for activities) when set. Not used by products or users.
